name: site-l1-semantics
description: Measures semantic coherence of SITE-FILL and LS-FILL lifecycle at L1 (settlement/street level). Each run starts the player physically present in a town/village/city settlement space using a short casual founding premise. No building-interior spawns, no 'entering' or 'approaching' phrasing. Tests SITE-FILL behavior at depth 1 (site grounds level) without entering any localspace. Metrics: ls_fill_rate, ls_unique_name_rate, localspace_count, ls_size_spread, ls_mean_size, site_size, site_size_stddev. row_extract captures the full local_spaces array for post-run Mother Brain semantic review.
